settings.headline: A simpler way to start prescription-led anti-aging care.
settings.subhead: From evaluation to provider review to monthly maintenance, Skinfluence is designed to feel clear, premium, and easy to follow.

settings.title: Complete your evaluation
settings.body: Answer a few questions about your skin, goals, history, and routine so a licensed provider can assess whether treatment may be appropriate.

settings.title: Receive provider review
settings.body: Your evaluation is reviewed by a licensed provider. In some cases, additional information may be needed before a final decision is made.

settings.title: Begin monthly care if approved
settings.body: If approved, you’ll move into a monthly treatment model designed for consistency, maintenance, and ease.

settings.headline: What the evaluation includes
settings.body:
The evaluation process is designed to build a clear picture of fit before treatment begins.

  • Your anti-aging goals and the concerns you want to address
  • Relevant skin history and current routine
  • Tolerance and sensitivity considerations
  • Any factors that may affect treatment fit or provider review

settings.headline: Possible outcomes
settings.body:
After review, your status may be one of three outcomes:

  • Approved so you can move into monthly care
  • More information needed before a final decision is made
  • Not eligible if treatment is not appropriate

The process should feel clear and predictable, not uncertain.

settings.headline: What happens after approval
settings.body: Approved users receive a treatment plan, instructions for use, a recurring monthly supply model, and ongoing support with refill continuity.

settings.headline: Ongoing support
settings.body: Support should not stop at approval. Skinfluence should help users understand how to begin, what normal adjustment may look like, and when to reach out with questions.

settings.headline: Know what to expect before you begin.
settings.subhead: Provider-reviewed anti-aging care designed to feel clear and simple from the start.
